name: Muhammad Zain Jahangir
title: Senior Technical Leader
experience: 12+ years of AAA game engineering experience
bio: Results-driven engineering leader with 12+ years architecting and shipping AAA gaming systems at global scale. Proven track record managing $1M–$5M budgets, leading cross-functional teams of 15+ engineers, and owning live platforms generating $350K–$1M in daily revenue. Equal parts strategic executive and hands-on technical authority — translating complex multi-domain requirements into actionable roadmaps while maintaining engineering excellence. Delivered 10+ globally released live-ops features for titles at Zynga and SciPlay. AWS and Unity certified.
funTitles: The Architect Your CI/CD Pipeline Was Missing
Turning Technical Authority into Business Impact
Where AAA Engineering Meets Executive Strategy
Wrangler of 14+ Engineers Across Time Zones
Building Revenue Platforms, Not Just Features
